issues.message: Semantic A/B/C ground truth covers 31 tracks from one football video.
Route-to-route timings use a 120-frame local file; the separate 35-second stress test still replays a file rather than a physical camera.
Wildlife, traffic, and education routes need reviewed per-track GT before semantic accuracy claims.
IDSW categories are diagnostic heuristics, not official TrackEval metrics.
